behavior_summary: Implements Vardion NPC behavior: casting spells, reacting to theft, dialog interactions, area initialization/cleanup, and periodic scheduling/movement.
VARDION::cast marks Vardion as 'mad' (aggressive) and spawns the spell/combat engine with the caller and the provided spell parameter.
Avatar theft triggers a staged escalation: warnings (vardionWarned increments), immobilization/stun and speech, then targeting/attack and possible scene spawn when thresholds/flags are reached.
Use/interact opens dialog gumps and dispatches a multi-option conversation helper; branching depends on many global flags to start scenes, join/combat behavior, or special daemon sequences.
enterFastArea initializes or removes area items (based on flags like acolyteKilled and goToInnerSanctum), and leaveFastArea frees the area membership list.
notable_control_flow: VARDION::cast (Event 11) -> set vardionMad = 1 -> spawn SPELCMBT::084D(pid, [BP+06h], param) -> propagate spawned retval to caller.

VARDION::AvatarStoleSomething: early exit if param==0 or if vardionJoined/sponsorTest/keyOfTheAcolyte suppress response; otherwise compute direction to stolen item, call METHOD::091C to animate/react, loop nearby items/actors to identify offender(s), increment vardionWarned and escalate vocal/hostile actions (stasis, bark lines, setTarget, spawn follow-up VARDION routines).

VARDION::use (Event 1): if dead -> dead-path; if alive -> toggle/close gump or call U8P_VARDION::073C to build dialog options. Branches into scene spawns (VARDION2, DAEMSCEN routines) or combat depending on flags (keyOfTheAcolyte, acolyteKilled, vardionMad, vardionJoined, sponsorTest, inDaemonScene, avatarMasterSorcerer).

U8P_VARDION::enterFastArea: iterate area contents and conditionally modify/destroy items using Item::getX, Item::destroy, and frame/shape checks; may teleport Vardion to inner sanctum if goToInnerSanctum is set; no-op when NPC is dead.
U8P_VARDION::leaveFastArea: call FREE::2A56 to free area/list context (cleanup).
open_questions: Exact semantic meaning of the numeric parameter passed to VARDION::cast (inferred as a spell id or variant) and how SPELCMBT::084D interprets it.
Precise strings, numeric thresholds, and exact branching conditions used by AvatarStoleSomething for each increment of vardionWarned (only high-level escalation observed).
Full identity and behavior of spawned 'VARDION' follow-up routines referenced during theft escalation (names like VARDION::04CE were inferred from flow but not canonically resolved).
Exact shape/frame constants and X-coordinate ranges used in enterFastArea to decide which items to destroy or modify.

main_function.name: U8P_VARDION::cast
main_function.purpose: When Vardion performs a U8P_VARDION::cast action, mark the NPC as enraged (set vardionMad) and spawn the spell/combat process (SPELCMBT::084D) using the caller pid, NPC context and supplied parameter; return/propagate the spawned process result.
entry_conditions: Event 11 (U8P_VARDION::cast) invoked on the NPC when a U8P_VARDION::cast action is triggered.
Called with a single uword parameter (likely a spell identifier or variant).

function_map.name: U8P_VARDION::cast
function_map.role: Perform spell casting: set vardionMad, spawn SPELCMBT::084D, return spawn retval

function_map.name: U8P_VARDION::AvatarStoleSomething
function_map.role: React to the avatar stealing from Vardion's area: warning escalation, immobilize/attack, set targets, and spawn follow-up behaviors

function_map.name: U8P_VARDION::look
function_map.role: Produce context-sensitive look/examine text based on vardionName, vardionJob and life state; call Item::bark to display strings

function_map.name: U8P_VARDION::schedule
function_map.role: Periodic scheduling: control movement/behavior (spawn METHOD::143A/METHOD::133F), teleport to inner sanctum if flagged, and set avatar as target when appropriate

function_map.name: U8P_VARDION::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area entry trigger: initialize/adjust/destroy nearby items and possibly teleport NPC based on acolyteKilled and goToInnerSanctum flags

function_map.name: U8P_VARDION::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area exit trigger: cleanup/free area membership lists (FREE::2A56)

function_map.name: U8P_VARDION::use
function_map.role: Main player interaction handler (Event 1): dialog/gump management and branch into conversation, scenes, or combat based on flags

function_map.name: U8P_VARDION::073C
function_map.role: Conversation subroutine: build selectable dialog list, present choices, handle player selection and branch to responses/scenes

internal_calls.purpose: Delegate conversation/menu construction and player choice handling
Related scheduling/teleportation behavior (appears to coordinate inner sanctum movement when flags set)

external_calls.purpose: Spawn the spell/combat engine/process which implements the U8P_VARDION::cast effect (passed pid, NPC context, U8P_VARDION::cast parameter)
Compute direction from Vardion to the stolen item to drive an animation/response
Spawn/trigger NPC reaction animation/behavior using computed direction
Temporarily immobilize the avatar during threat or attack sequences
Inspect item X coordinates to decide whether to destroy or adjust area items
Remove area items when conditions (shape/frame/X ranges or acolyteKilled) indicate they should be cleared
Open dialog/UI gump when starting conversation with the player (gump management)
Common follow-up method invoked at the end of some interaction paths (UI/behavior cleanup or next-step)
Free/cleanup area/list references associated with the fast-area membership
Spawn movement/behavior routine as part of periodic scheduling
Secondary behavior/method spawned after METHOD::143A depending on results
Trigger scene/daemon-managed scripts when flags like keyOfTheAcolyte or acolyteKilled apply
Emit the selected look/description string to the viewer/pid
Set the NPC's combat/attack target to the avatar as part of escalation
Teleport Vardion into inner sanctum coordinates when goToInnerSanctum flag is set

reads.name: vardionJoined
reads.likely_effect: Suppress hostile theft response; treat avatar as ally

reads.name: sponsorTest
reads.likely_effect: Privilege flag that suppresses hostile reactions (e.g., theft handling)

reads.name: keyOfTheAcolyte
reads.likely_effect: Gate daemon scene interactions and suppress some hostile responses

reads.name: vardionWarned
reads.likely_effect: Read to determine current theft-warning level and select dialog branch

reads.name: acolyteKilled
reads.likely_effect: Cause enterFastArea to alter/destroy items and change use() behavior (daemon scene triggers)

reads.name: goToInnerSanctum
reads.likely_effect: Trigger teleportation of Vardion into an inner sanctum during area entry/schedule

reads.name: inDaemonScene
reads.likely_effect: Prevent schedule() movement/behavior while Vardion is inside a scripted scene

reads.name: avatarMasterSorcerer
reads.likely_effect: Cause Vardion to set the avatar as target or behave specially toward avatar

reads.name: vardionName
reads.likely_effect: Control whether 'Vardion' appears in full-name or short forms in look() and dialog

reads.name: vardionJob
reads.likely_effect: Control job/title wording in look()/dialog ('Sorcerer' vs 'Mage')

reads.name: vardionOffer
reads.likely_effect: Enable or disable specific dialog/quest options in the conversation helper

writes.name: vardionMad
writes.likely_effect: Set to indicate Vardion is enraged/hostile after casting; used to change subsequent use()/behavior branching

writes.name: vardionWarned
writes.likely_effect: Increment or update to escalate theft-warning state, influencing subsequent warnings and attack behavior

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Implements Vardion NPC behavior: casting spells, reacting to theft, dialog interactions, area initialization/cleanup, and periodic scheduling/movement.
